scope.summary: D4 has two halves. FUZZ-SHARD half is COMPLETE on oraclemcp at abe65e48 (guard differential target sharded + fuzz-bound budget gate). RQ-PREP half is BLOCKED: the honest rq-prep verifier is landed but the required hosted prep->strict cold-start measurement does not exist yet. This bead is NOT complete and must not close.
out_of_scope: Changing any fuzz-target .rs source or the classifier target's semantics (it is the C6-split isomorphism proof) — abe65e48 touched no .rs source
Dispatching the hosted Release Qualification prep->strict pair (operator's call; outward-facing, consumes CI minutes; routable to the dedicated rust-oracledb pane)
Removing the ALLOW_STALE_MUTATION_SEAL flags (next train's decision)

entry_points.name: FUZZ-SHARD half — COMPLETE at abe65e484e109ecda7088c0bc8530e5bae6af242 (main-reachable)
entry_points.trace: abe65e48 changed ONLY .github/workflows/fuzz.yml + scripts/ci_lane_budget.py (no .rs source, so classifier C6-isomorphism semantics unchanged). Guard differential target alter_session_parse is 4-way sharded with per-shard seeds 3001-3004; chain_verify + oauth_token_validate single-shard seeded. Verified 2026-07-22: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile scripts/ci_lane_budget.py OK; python3 scripts/ci_lane_budget.py --selftest = 14/14 PASS (differential-shard-shape accepted, unsharded-differential refused, unseeded-shards refused); python3 scripts/ci_lane_budget.py fuzz-bound = PASS (1 job sharded+bounded, 120m ceiling, each shard carries -max_total_time).

entry_points.name: RQ-PREP half — verifier landed, measurement BLOCKED
entry_points.trace: scripts/ci_lane_budget.py rq-prep is the honest verifier (refuses without a hosted prep->strict pair at ONE exact SHA where strict started after prep completed, plus a cold baseline: E_NO_PREP/E_NO_STRICT/E_NOT_WARMED/E_NO_COLD_BASELINE/E_SHA_MISMATCH). Live read-only run 2026-07-22: 'python3 scripts/ci_lane_budget.py rq-prep --repo MuhDur/rust-oracledb --sha 2efd7b545d64261295e5bb37eb6306ba543c87d0' -> REFUSED [E_NO_PREP]. The two most recent RQ runs (29857867818 @2efd7b54, 29845920299 @4cb01769) are BOTH strict-mode at DIFFERENT SHAs; no prep run exists at any SHA.

limitations: D4 is NOT complete: the RQ-prep acceptance (a hosted prep->strict cold-start reduction certified by rq-prep) cannot be met until the operator dispatches the Release Qualification workflow at one exact SHA in mode=prep then mode=strict and keeps the timing/cache evidence.
No hosted RQ prep run exists at any SHA as of 2026-07-22; rq-prep correctly refuses to fabricate a positive verdict.
This evidence file is a status record (readiness not-ready), NOT a closure; the bead stays open.
follow_ups: Operator: dispatch driver Release Qualification mode=prep then mode=strict at one exact SHA (routable to the dedicated rust-oracledb pane), then run scripts/ci_lane_budget.py rq-prep --repo MuhDur/rust-oracledb --sha <SHA> --require-reduction to certify the cold-start reduction and close D4.
